title: Alpha
description: Skills & Plugins upgrade — Capability Library rearchitected as Skills Catalog with progressive loading model; Skills mindset woven into Roles, Execution Models, Signal Events, and Context Debt; Plugin concept introduced as the team's deployment configuration.
highlights: Capability Library → Skills Catalog: dynamic, progressive loading model — skills invoked on demand, not pre-loaded at session start
Skills mindset applied across all roles including governance layer — PO, Stakeholders, and Architects can leverage Skills within their gate-bound functions
Skill Capture replaces Capability Harvest — Tech Lead approval gate added before a skill becomes active status
Plugin configuration debt added to Context Debt section — new audit checklist subsection for Plugin Configuration
